content.full_text:
August 26, 1977

Ms. Madeline T. O'Connor  
720 South Normandie Avenue, Apt. 317  
Los Angeles, California 90005

Dear Ms. O'Connor:

Thank you for your letter requesting information on the formation of a political action committee. The definition of committee can be found on page 1 of the enclosed "Committee Reporting Guidelines." The key to committee status is if a group raises or spends $500 or makes non-monetary contributions of $500 or more in a calendar year in an attempt to influence the outcome of a state or local election.

The Political Reform Act does not apply to elections conducted and contributions made to candidates seeking federal offices. If your group anticipates making such contributions, it should contact the Federal Elections Commission for a copy of their guidelines.

Enclosed is some informational material which may be of assistance to you. Please let us know if we can be of additional help. You may, however, receive local assistance by contacting the Los Angeles Registrar-Recorder's office, 213/974-6701.

Sincerely,

Mary Ann Kvasager  
Technical Assistance and Analysis Division

mak  
Enclosures
